results.justification: EXACT TWIN — heavy-hitter importance-based eviction with consistently-important entries never evicted IS the inner-ring of BOMA-RING-KV.
Defensive-token preservation against eviction IS the outer-ring safety-boundary mechanism.
SafeKV separates sensitive cache entries from non-sensitive — direct twin of outer-ring safety-boundary tokens.
Per-token retention gate with decay scalar IS the value-tier traversal mechanism with explicit priority.
Hot/warm/cold tier hierarchy by priority covers the 3-tier ring concept.
Multi-tier KV cache with priority access covers the 3-ring tier-traversal paradigm.
Two-stage centroid-then-token retrieval covers concentric ring access pattern.
Eviction disproportionately targets defense entries — exact problem BOMA-RING-KV outer-ring solves; covered prior art.
